name: hackathon-voting-app
description: Hackathon team voting app — teams distribute points across other teams' presentations.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client && npm run test:e2e
